name: sidon_1000
note: Singer over GF(31) gives a 32-element Sidon set in [0,992]. Beating 32 in [1,1000] would be a real result — the next Singer prime power above 31 is 32 (=2^5), giving 33 in [0,1056], so a 33-element set in [1,1000] is the natural target. SAT-extend (library.sat_extensions.extend_sidon_by_one) is the simplest route; prime-power Singer is the algebraic alternative.
